# CertifiedData Payments — AI Agent Discovery Index

Site:      https://certifieddata.io/agent-payments
Platform:  CertifiedData Payments
Full:      https://github.com/certifieddata/certifieddata-payments-public/blob/main/llms-full.txt

CertifiedData Payments (CDP) is a provenance-aware payments and settlement layer for the CertifiedData ecosystem.
It enables transactions that carry verifiable links to AI artifacts, certificates, datasets, decisions, and models.

## Discovery

> Machine discovery manifest — start here
api-manifest.json

> Capabilities manifest
schemas/capabilities/capabilities.json

> Operational constraints
constraints.json

## REST API

> OpenAPI 3.1 contract
openapi/certifieddata-payments-v1.openapi.yaml

## Events and Webhooks

> AsyncAPI contract
asyncapi/certifieddata-payments-events-v1.asyncapi.yaml

## Schemas

> Resource schemas
schemas/resources/

> Common primitives
schemas/common/

> State machines
schemas/state-machines/

> Error catalog
schemas/errors/error-catalog.json

> Enum registries
schemas/enums/

## Examples and Test Vectors

> JSON payload examples
examples/json/

> Test vectors (webhook signature, idempotency, provenance)
test-vectors/

## SDKs

> TypeScript SDK
packages/typescript-sdk/

> Python SDK
packages/python-sdk/

## Documentation

> Docs index
docs/docs-index.json

docs/overview.md
